reason_not_consumed: At the moment of approval NO outreach list existed. outreach_templates.md contained ZERO named entities ([First Name] placeholders); the ICP named 3 segments and 0 companies; outreach_approval_log.jsonl did not exist. An approval cannot attach to an artifact that does not exist — treating it as valid would have meant the agent selecting the targets and then citing the founder's approval of its own choices. That is circular authority.
action_taken: Built the list the approval was meant to cover: outreach_target_list.md — 25 targets, company+role level, 20 named + 5 reserved for the founder's own network. Research-grounded (NDAA FY2026 Sec.1513, CMMC Phase 1 enforcement window). No personal contact data compiled.
founder_decisions_outstanding: approve/strike each of the 20 named companies
supply the 5 Tier-4 names from own network
name the individual at each approved company (agent will not compile personal contact data)
authorize EACH send separately — GATE-REV-01 approves the target SET, not a send
agent_will_not: compile or scrape named individuals' personal contact details
send any message on the founder's behalf without per-send authorization
select who gets contacted and then cite founder approval of its own selection
